title: Fix controversies index: search input missing aria-label + duplicate h1 on replications
description:
The controversies index page has a search input (id='search-input') that lacks an aria-label. Add `aria-label="Search controversies"` to this input element.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.

title: Fix replications page: duplicate h1 heading
description:
The replications page has TWO `<h1>` elements both saying 'Replication Map'. There should only be one <h1> per page. Find the duplicate and change it to an <h2> or remove it.

Do NOT output any thinking or explanation. Output ONLY search/replace blocks.
